mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_automation_log (automation_type, event_key, trigger_type, trigger_reason, user_id, target_id, success, detail, event_time, created_by) VALUES (#{automationType}, #{eventKey}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerReason}, #{userId}, #{targetId}, #{success}, #{detail}, #{eventTime}, #{createdBy})

where.if: AND ( user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR event_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR trigger_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR detail LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

AND ( l.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.event_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.trigger_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.detail LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.automation_type, l.event_key, l.trigger_type, l.trigger_reason, l.user_id, l.target_id, l.success, l.detail, l.event_time, l.created_by, p.name AS user_name FROM twin_automation_log l LEFT JOIN aro_personnel p ON l.user_id = p.user_id
ORDER BY l.event_time DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
